schedules.agentSelectEmpty: No agents. Add an agent first.
schedules.onlySelectedMonthHint: Specific-date schedules are shown only when they fall within the selected month.

calendarDatePicker.pickHint: Click dates to add or remove them from the selection.

alerts.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
alerts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
alerts.needEmailWhenCreateUser: Enter an email if you enable user account creation.
alerts.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
alerts.needStartEndTime: Enter both start and end times.
alerts.needAtLeastOneDay: Select at least one day of the week.

agentForm.name: Name *
agentForm.channelFocusPlaceholder: e.g., Official cafe A, Community B
agentForm.slackUserHint: When sharing to Slack, the assigned agent is mentioned automatically.
agentForm.createLoginAccountHint: If checked, a user account is created automatically so the agent can log in.
agentForm.passwordHint: This password is used by the agent to log in.
agentForm.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep unchanged (min 6 chars)
agentForm.newPasswordHint: Only agents with a linked user account can be updated.

scheduleForm.needDaysHint: Select at least one day of the week.

cardExchange.title: Card exchange posts
cardExchange.subtitle: Fetch card exchange (menu 230) posts separately (e.g., from Naver Cafe). The table date prefers the original post time; if unavailable, ingestion time is used.
cardExchange.dailyHint2: “Filtered period total” counts a post if any of original date, original time, or ingestion time falls within the range; it may differ from the daily totals below.

table.filteredTotalHint: Total retrieved by the start/end date above

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load card exchange posts.

agentPerformance.title: Agent performance
agentPerformance.subtitle: Review issue handling stats and performance by agent.

volume.title: Ingested issues (crawler · clan · card exchange)
volume.hintMid: in KST. Weekly uses ISO week (YYYY-Www). The first two columns are legacy crawler codes (PUBG_PC / PUBG_MOBILE),
volume.hintStrong2: which may not map 1:1 with work projects
volume.hintSuffix: . Clan and card exchange follow the same rules as the management pages. Card exchange is excluded from the mobile crawler total (no double counting).
volume.empty: No intake data for the selected period/filters.
volume.dailyDetailHint: Because you are in daily view, each row is the count per KST date.
volume.dailyDetailExplain: The table above is grouped weekly/monthly; below is the same range split by day. “Daily sum” matches the range total and the summary cards.

empty.title: No issues processed in the selected period.

form.name: Project name *
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for the project
form.confirmDelete:
Delete project "{{name}}"?

You cannot delete it if there is linked data (issues, agents, categories, etc.).

aiPrompts.title: AI prompts
aiPrompts.subtitle: Manage AI analysis criteria via prompts.

fields.systemPlaceholder: Enter the system prompt to send to the AI…
fields.systemHint: This prompt defines the AI's behavior. Be careful when editing.
fields.userTemplatePlaceholder: User prompt template (variables like {{content}} can be used)

alerts.addKeywordError: An error occurred while adding the keyword.
alerts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
alerts.deleteKeywordError: An error occurred while deleting the keyword.
alerts.settingsSaveError: An error occurred while saving settings.
alerts.invalidBoardId: Invalid board ID. Refresh the list and try again.
alerts.saveBoardError: An error occurred while saving the board: {{message}}
alerts.dailyBoardNotFoundOrPath: The board was not found or the API path is invalid. Check if the backend was restarted.
alerts.requestError: An error occurred during the request.
alerts.triggerSent: Crawl trigger sent. The worker will start scanning shortly.
alerts.deleteBoardError: An error occurred while deleting the board.
alerts.toggleStatusError: An error occurred while changing status.

daily.fromListTitle: Open the board and parse list dates (50 per page) to count posts per day
daily.rawLogHint2: . If the post already exists as an issue, RawLog may be skipped, so it can be
daily.rawLogHintStrong2: lower than the actual post count
daily.fromListHint: Reads the date cell from the Naver list. The table below is filtered by the selected start/end dates.
daily.cardExchangeHintPrefix: For card-exchange boards, the most accurate “actual post count” is on
daily.emptyCrawlerRan: The crawler ran, but no posts were collected from this board (RawLog 0).
daily.emptyCrawlerReasons: The list page structure may differ, there may be no posts, or parsing may have resulted in 0 rows.
daily.emptyNoData: No daily RawLog/issue data for the selected period. Expand the date range, or scan again and retry.
daily.issueTableTitle: Issues · By issue created date (KST) (includes skipped RawLog)
daily.rawLogTableEmpty: No daily RawLog rows in this period. (Scans may have skipped saving because issues already existed → see issue table below.)
daily.fromListDisplayRange: Display: {{start}} ~ {{end}} (same as the date inputs above)
daily.fromListNoRowsInRange: No list rows in the selected range. Expand the range or click list refresh again.

lastScan.clanNoHistoryNote: The displayed time is based on the general cafe worker; the clan worker has no dedicated scan history yet.

settings.title: Monitoring settings
settings.cookiePlaceholder: NID_AUT=...; NID_SES=...; (paste cookies copied from your browser)
settings.cookieHint: Cookies are required to access members-only posts.
settings.copyGuide1: While logged in to Naver, open developer tools (F12).
settings.copyGuide3: Copy the NID_AUT and NID_SES cookies.
settings.cookieWarning: Cookies are sensitive personal data. Store them safely. When they expire, copy and update them again.
settings.excludedBoardsHint: One board name per line, e.g. welcome, rank-up request, free board.
settings.clanBoardIdsHint: Comma-separated IDs to limit clan crawling. Leave empty to auto-select by name patterns (clan/broadcast/discord, etc.).

lastScanGuide.line1: Grouped by project. Within each group, boards are ordered by most recent scan.
lastScanGuide.line2: The clan worker targets the PC board row when a board name/label contains "clan/broadcast/discord"; otherwise it uses the configured clan board parent IDs.
lastScanGuide.line3: The actual opened list matches the "Clan worker URL" shown in the table below.

tooltips.naColumn: Crawler profile for the Naver Cafe worker (issue source / filters). Managed as SystemCode CRAWLER_GAME.
tooltips.lastScanColumn: KST. Clan-only boards show the clan worker (naverCafeClan) last scan time.

boards.title: Crawl target management
boards.subtitlePrefix: You can add Naver Cafe boards to crawl automatically. The list is grouped by
boards.emptyHint: Click the "Add board" button above to add a board to crawl.

logs.title: Recent collection logs
logs.subtitle: Shows the latest 50 collected logs. (auto refresh every 30 seconds)

hints.name: Enter a name to identify the board to crawl.
hints.urlLocked: The URL cannot be changed when editing. (prevents duplicates)
hints.url: Enter the Naver Cafe "All posts" page URL.
hints.crawlerProfileMid: . It affects issue source/collection filters and is independent from the
hints.project: Issues collected from this board will be associated with this project.
hints.label: Label used for internal management only. (optional)
hints.scanInterval: How often to scan this board. (min 30s, max 3600s)

errors.selectSourceProject: Select a source project to copy from.
errors.cannotCloneSameProject: Cannot copy to the same project.

clone.label: Copy from another project
clone.confirm:
Copy top-level groups and subcategories from the selected project into the current project.
Groups with the same code are skipped.
Continue?
clone.done:
Copy complete:
- Created {{createdGroups}} top-level groups
- Created {{createdCategories}} subcategories
- Skipped {{skippedGroups}} duplicate groups

groups.title: Top-level groups
groups.subtitle: Edit color and description directly on the cards.

delete.confirmCascade: [Warning] "{{name}}" and all subcategories will be deleted.

categories.title: Subcategories
categories.subtitle: Select a top-level group to add or remove subcategories on the right.

description.p1: Monitor clan-related posts and alert rule violations. The default range is
description.p2: ; use reset to view all time. Dates in the table prefer
description.sourceCreatedAt: original post time on the cafe
description.p3: , and only fall back to collection time when missing. The date filter matches if
description.dateFilterRuleStrong: original date, source time, or collection date (KST)
description.p4: falls in the range (e.g. a post from yesterday collected today appears in “today”). Posts from the clan-only FE menu (default menu 178) include
description.menu178Strong: both clan worker and regular PC cafe collection

selection.hint: Select rows to dismiss alerts in bulk.

table.title: Title
table.dismissAllTitle: Dismiss all alerts for this post

boardIssueStats.configDescription: Board post counts: boards to display

listColumn.hintFiltered: Filters list rows by written date from the list. ({{start}} ~ {{end}})
listColumn.hintAll: If start/end are empty, all written dates from the list are summed.

boardIssueStats.title: Post counts by board
boardIssueStats.hideZeroIssueBoards: Hide boards with 0 issues in DB
boardIssueStats.includeListBased: Include list-based totals (closer to real counts, may be slow)
boardIssueStats.boardsLoadFailed: Could not load the board list.
boardIssueStats.selectBoardsHint: Only selected boards are aggregated. With list-based totals on, a smaller selection reduces scan time.
boardIssueStats.adminOnlySelect: Choosing boards to display is available to admin accounts only.
boardIssueStats.listHelp1: List totals read the date column on the Naver board list. Legacy ArticleList URLs may scan multiple pages;
boardIssueStats.listHelp2: URLs usually reflect one page only.
boardIssueStats.listComputing: Computing list-based totals (may take a moment)…

errors.needBoard: Select at least one board to query.

boardListSnapshot.title: List (range) DB snapshots
boardListSnapshot.subtitle: Daily counts stored from Naver list scans. Empty cells mean no snapshot for that date.
boardListSnapshot.projectFilterHint: Boards are filtered by the project selected in the header.
boardListSnapshot.noProjectWarning: No project selected. Choose a project in the main header to see only that project’s boards.
boardListSnapshot.adminOnlyBoardSelect: Only admins can change board selection. All active boards in the current project are queried.
boardListSnapshot.footer: Hover a cell for saved time and pages scanned. Data is filled when list scans or “post counts by board” list aggregation runs.
boardListSnapshot.emptyNoDates: No dates in the selected range.
boardListSnapshot.emptyPrompt: Pick a range and click Query.

stepFloating.title: Step floating guides
stepFloating.subtitle: Manage hints shown in the left/right floating panels on the work checklist screen (inspection areas 1 and 2). Agents can read them while working.
stepFloating.placeholderContent: Enter step-by-step guidance. Lines starting with http:// or https:// become links automatically.

commentWatch.unmanageConfirm:
Stop comment-watch mode for this issue?
{{line}}
commentWatch.heading: Comment-watch issues
commentWatch.sub1: Issues with periodic comment checks on the Naver Cafe original thread.
commentWatch.openTitleCafe: Open the Naver Cafe post in a new tab
commentWatch.openTitleApp: No original URL; open the issue in the app
commentWatch.unmanageTitle: Stop periodic watch (can re-enable in issue detail)

workGuide.title: Work guide management
workGuide.subtitle: Create, edit, and delete work guides used by the AI chatbot.
workGuide.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, content, category, or tags…
workGuide.deleteError: An error occurred while deleting the guide.
workGuide.needTitleContent: Please enter a title and content.
workGuide.saveError: An error occurred while saving the guide.
workGuide.uploadPickLabel: Choose files (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, HTML)
workGuide.uploadDragHint: Select files or drag and drop here
workGuide.uploadError: An error occurred while uploading files.

workChecklist.title: Work checklist management
workChecklist.subtitle: Register, edit, delete, and reorder items agents check off during work.
workChecklist.bannerHint: Pinned at the top of the agent work checklist. Leave empty to hide.
workChecklist.bannerPlaceholder: e.g. Daily report deadline is now 6:00 PM this week.
workChecklist.bannerSaved: Banner saved. It is pinned at the top of the agent checklist.
workChecklist.overviewIntro: For the selected date and work type, only agents scheduled for that shift are shown. Assignment follows agent schedules only; other agents are omitted. Matches the team progress view on the agent screen.
workChecklist.overviewNoUsers: (No scheduled assignees for this date/type. Check agent schedules and user links.)
workChecklist.reorderHint: Reorder is available only when filter is “All”.
workChecklist.reorderBlocked: Reorder is available only in the “All” work type filter.
workChecklist.emptyList: No items yet. Use “Add item” to create one.
workChecklist.urlHint: If set, agents can open this address from the list and agent screen.
workChecklist.workTypeHint: Shown only to workers matching day/swing/night/noon or inspection area 1/2. “All” shows every item except inspection 1/2-only rows.
workChecklist.periodHint: Leave blank for no limit. When set, the item appears only within that range.
workChecklist.monthsHint: Shown only in selected months. Leave empty for every month.
workChecklist.weekdaysHint: Shown only on selected weekdays. Leave empty for every weekday.
workChecklist.floatingHint: When area 1/2 is checked, the item appears only under that floating region. Both: show on both sides.

workNotification.title: Work notifications
workNotification.subtitle: Register and manage LINE work notifications. Supports daily, weekly, monthly, specific date, and interval schedules.
workNotification.lineUsageQuotaNote: (same unit as the 500 free messages/month quota)
workNotification.lineUsageQuotaWarning: High usage may come from interval rules. Example: every 30 minutes can mean 10–20 sends per day and 300+ per month. Disable unneeded rules or widen the interval to save quota.
workNotification.lineManagerLink: Check official quota in LINE Official Account Manager →
workNotification.summaryHint: Active rules only. Counts by specific date or interval help estimate sends.
workNotification.summarySpecificLine: {{date}}: {{count}} → {{count}} send(s) that day at that time
workNotification.summaryIntervalLine: {{minutes}} min: {{count}} rule(s) → one send every {{minutes}} min within the window (daily total depends on window and interval)
workNotification.pendingHint: Uses the same clock as the worker. After the scheduled time, refresh—your rule should appear here.
workNotification.copyTitle: Copy a registered notification to register a new one with a different time
workNotification.addTimeTitle: Add another time in the day
workNotification.additionalTimesHint: Creates one notification per time on save
workNotification.additionalTimesEmpty: Use the ＋ button to add times (e.g. 09:00, 12:00, 18:00).
workNotification.lineLabelHint: Display labels can be set manually.
workNotification.lineIdPlaceholderEmpty: LINE channel ID (collected after bot join)
workNotification.lineCollectHint: Invite the bot to the group and send a message to collect targets.
workNotification.lineLabelModalHint: Names shown in the dropdown. Clear to revert to the default/name/ID display.
workNotification.mentionDevHint: Enable Developer Mode in Discord, then right‑click → Copy ID.
workNotification.extraMessagePlaceholder: Optional text included with the notification.
workNotification.alertChannelRequired: LINE channel ID or Discord webhook URL is required.
